name: Thunder Jolt
text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

name: Moongeist Beam
text: This attack's damage is not affected by effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Fire Spin
text: Discard 2 Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Hydro Pump
text: Does more damage for each Water Energy attached.

name: Psychic
text: Does more damage for each Energy on the opponent.

name: Quick Attack
text: Flip a coin. If heads this attack does more damage.

name: Body Slam
text: Flip a coin. If heads the opponent is Paralyzed.

name: Shadow Room
text: Place damage counters on one of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Dragon Gale
text: This attack also damages your Bench.

name: Ember
text: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Bubble
text: Flip a coin. If heads the opponent is Paralyzed.

name: Haunt
text: Move a damage counter from this Pokémon to one of your opponent's Pokémon.
